    com.zendesk.maxwell - package com.zendesk.maxwell
    top level classes concerned with instantiating and running a Maxwell replicator.
    com.zendesk.maxwell.bootstrap - package com.zendesk.maxwell.bootstrap
    bootstrapping outputs the current dataset into a stream.
    com.zendesk.maxwell.errors - package com.zendesk.maxwell.errors
    exceptions thrown by maxwell.
    com.zendesk.maxwell.filtering - package com.zendesk.maxwell.filtering
    filtering allows users to choose what data to output in a stream
    com.zendesk.maxwell.monitoring - package com.zendesk.maxwell.monitoring
    monitoring, diagnostics, and the HTTP server
    com.zendesk.maxwell.producer - package com.zendesk.maxwell.producer
    producers write to streams and sinks of various types.
    com.zendesk.maxwell.producer.partitioners - package com.zendesk.maxwell.producer.partitioners
    partitioners deal with subdividing streams by data key
    com.zendesk.maxwell.recovery - package com.zendesk.maxwell.recovery
    allows users to continue a stream after changing masters
    com.zendesk.maxwell.replication - package com.zendesk.maxwell.replication
    concerns the operation of the binlog replicator
    com.zendesk.maxwell.row - package com.zendesk.maxwell.row
    Maxwell's representation of a row from the binlog
    com.zendesk.maxwell.schema - package com.zendesk.maxwell.schema
    stores and updates (via SQL parsing) a view of the mysql schema
    com.zendesk.maxwell.schema.columndef - package com.zendesk.maxwell.schema.columndef
    column type definitions - cast from a mysql column to JSON
    com.zendesk.maxwell.schema.ddl - package com.zendesk.maxwell.schema.ddl
    the mysql DDL schema parser lives here.
    com.zendesk.maxwell.scripting - package com.zendesk.maxwell.scripting
    interfaces and code for javascript filters
    com.zendesk.maxwell.util - package com.zendesk.maxwell.util
    grab-bag of code

    ensureGtidMysqlState(Connection) - Static method in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellMysqlStatus
    Verify that we can safely turn on maxwell GTID mode
    ensureMaxwellMysqlState(Connection) - Static method in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellMysqlStatus
    Verify that the maxwell database is in the expected state
    ensureMaxwellSchema(Connection, String) - Static method in class com.zendesk.maxwell.schema.SchemaStoreSchema
     
    ensureReplicationMysqlState(Connection) - Static method in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellMysqlStatus
    Verify that replication is in the expected state: Check that a serverID is set check that binary logging is on Check that the binlog_format is "ROW" Warn if binlog_row_image is MINIMAL

    metricsAgeSlo - Variable in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellConfig
    time in seconds before incrementing the "slo_violation" metric
    metricsDatadogAPIKey - Variable in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellConfig
    datadog apikey used when reporting type is http
    metricsDatadogHost - Variable in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellConfig
    host to send UDP DD metrics to
    metricsDatadogInterval - Variable in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellConfig
    time in seconds between datadog metrics pushes
    metricsDatadogPort - Variable in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellConfig
    port to send UDP DD metrics to
    metricsDatadogSite - Variable in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellConfig
    "us" or "eu"
    metricsDatadogTags - Variable in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellConfig
    list of additional tags to send to datadog, as tag:value,tag:value
    metricsDatadogType - Variable in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellConfig
    How to report metrics to datadog, either "udp" or "http"
    metricsJvm - Variable in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellConfig
    whether to report JVM metrics
    metricsPrefix - Variable in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellConfig
    path prefix for metrics server
    metricsReportingType - Variable in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellConfig
    string describing how to report metrics.
    metricsSlf4jInterval - Variable in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellConfig
    for slf4j metrics reporter, how often to report

    producerAckTimeout - Variable in class com.zendesk.maxwell.MaxwellConfig
    Used in all producers deriving from AbstractAsyncProducer.
    In milliseconds, time a message can spend in the InflightMessageList without server acknowledgement before being considered lost.

    If non-null, generate a producer with this factory

    If non, fallback to MaxwellConfig.maxwellMysql
